## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.2]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- METER version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Provider: [e.g. Claude Code]

## Additional Context

Screenshots, logs, anything else relevant.
